parts.name: Part 1
parts.instructions: You must answer this question. Write your answer in about 100 words.

tasks.lead: Read this email from your English-speaking friend Tom and the notes you have made.

stimulus.head: EMAIL
stimulus.body:
From: Tom
Subject: Can I borrow your camera?

Hi!

My cousin is getting married next weekend and I'd love to take some good photos, but my camera is broken. Could I possibly borrow yours?

I promise I'll be really careful with it. When could I collect it, and is there anything I should know about using it?

Thanks a lot!
Tom

bullets: agree to lend Tom your camera
say when he can collect it
explain one thing he should be careful about
ask Tom to show you the photos afterwards

parts.name: Part 2
parts.instructions: Answer one of these questions. Write your answer in about 100 words.

tasks.lead: You see this announcement in your school English-language magazine.

stimulus.title: SOMETHING I COULDN'T LIVE WITHOUT
stimulus.body: Is there one object you use every day that is really important to you? Write an article describing it and explaining why it matters so much. The best articles will be published next month.

bullets: which object is important to you
how you use it every day
why you couldn't live without it

tasks.lead: Your English teacher has asked you to write a story.
tasks.startSentence: Anna promised to return the book the next day, but things did not go as planned.

stimulus.body:
Your story must begin with this sentence:

Anna promised to return the book the next day, but things did not go as planned.
